62121.name: Charges Received
62121.desc: Revenue from fees charged by Council (waste disposal, liquid waste, cemetery). Refunds/credits code here.
62121.pdf_desc: Revenue from fees charged by Council, such as the waste disposal charges at Council's landfill and liquid waste disposal charges at Council's treatment plant.

62125.name: Cemetery Charges
62125.desc: Income received for prepaid deposits, instalment plan payments and prepayments for cemetery plots. Includes advance/prepaid arrangements and time-of-need charges. Cemetery refunds and credits also code here.
62125.pdf_desc: Income received for prepaid deposits, instalment plan payments & prepayments for cemetery plots.

64111.name: Discounts & Rebates Received
64111.desc: Sundry discounts received on expenses, such as postage rebate.
64111.pdf_desc: Sundry discounts received on expenses, such as postage rebate.

64211.name: Insurance Recoveries
64211.desc: Recoveries received from external parties in relation to insurance claims.
64211.pdf_desc: ) Recoveries received from external parties in relation to insurance claims.

64311.name: Plant Leases (Revenue)
64311.desc: Leasing revenue from Council-owned plant provided for hire to Council employees.
64311.pdf_desc: Leasing revenue from Council-owned plant provided for hire to Council employees.

64312.name: External Plant Hire (Revenue)
64312.desc: Leasing revenue from Council-owned plant provided for hire to external parties.
64312.pdf_desc: Leasing revenue from Council-owned plant provided for hire to external parties.

71000.name: Timesheet Clearing
71000.desc: Clearing only. Must always net to nil.
71000.pdf_desc: AccountAutomated Entries Only. Solely for HR/Payroll System generated entries.

71111.name: Full Time Staff
71111.desc: Permanent full-time wages via payroll. Wages when on leave not charged here.
71111.pdf_desc: Wages for days at work and RDO's for permanent full time employees paid via payroll (wages when on leave are not charged to this account).

71113.name: Temporary Staff
71113.desc: Directly engaged Council temps via payroll. NOT agency temps.
71113.pdf_desc: Wages for staff employed at full time hours for a specific time period who are paid at the rates provided for permanent employees and enjoy the same entitlements as a permanent employee and are paid via payroll. Temporary staff employed through an agency should be coded to 73214.

71114.name: Casual Staff
71114.pdf_desc: Wages for staff employed on an hourly basis and paid via payroll. Casual staff are generally employed for short-term and ad-hoc projects and do not receive the same entitlements as permanent staff. Their employment is subject to termination at any time.

71115.name: Trainees
71115.desc: Wages for employees engaged under formal traineeships.
71115.pdf_desc: ) Non-reimbursable wages paid to employees on work cover (usually up to first five days).

71116.name: Workers Compensation Insurance
71116.desc: Recording only — always nets to nil. System generated.
71116.pdf_desc: ) Reimbursable wages paid to employees on work cover (this account is for recording purposes only and will result in a nil balance as reimbursements are also included).

71118.name: Temporary Appointments
71118.desc: Wages for temporary appointment staff engaged directly by Council.

71119.name: Other Wages
71119.desc: Other wage payments not classified elsewhere.
71119.pdf_desc: Wages for days at work & RDO's for staff employed at part time hours who are permanent employees and are paid via payroll (wages when on leave are not charged to this account).

71121.name: Councillor Superannuation
71121.pdf_desc: Wages for trainees employed on Council's traineeship programs.

71211.name: Allowances
71211.desc: Allowances paid to employees as part of their employment conditions.
71211.pdf_desc: Paid Employee allowances e.g. first aid, shift, meal, mileage, leading hand.

71221.name: Annual Leave
71221.pdf_desc: Payroll tax expense and Public Holidays & Xmas Leave entitlements earned by staff.

71222.name: Sick / Personal Leave
71222.desc: Sick and personal leave wage costs.
71222.pdf_desc: Annual, Sick, and Long Service Leave entitlements earned by staff.

71223.name: Workers Compensation Leave
71223.desc: Leave wages while on workers compensation.
71223.pdf_desc: Expenses related to plant and tools of an incidental nature that will be used in a number of projects and therefore should not be costed directly to a project (e.g. Shovels).

71224.name: Maternity Leave
71224.pdf_desc: Payment of maternity leave as per the EB6 agreement.

71225.name: Parental Leave
71225.pdf_desc: Payment of parental leave as per the Commonwealth Govts Paid Parental Leave Scheme (Finance use only).

71226.name: Banked RDO / On Call Leave
71226.pdf_desc: Employee oncost accrual account for banked RDO's and on call leave.

71231.name: Superannuation
71231.pdf_desc: Total employer contributions to superannuation funds.

71241.name: Work Cover Premium
71241.desc: Annual premium with Work Cover for work-related injury compensation.
71241.pdf_desc: Expenses related to annual premium with Work Cover against the cost of compensating a worker who has a work-related injury.

71311.name: Bonuses Paid
71311.desc: Bonus payments in accordance with employment agreements.
71311.pdf_desc: Bonus payments in accordance with employment agreements.

71312.name: Redundancies Paid
71312.pdf_desc: Redundancy payments in accordance with employment agreements.

71321.name: Fringe Benefits Tax
71321.desc: Tax on benefits provided to employees.
71321.pdf_desc: Tax on benefits provided to employees.

71331.name: Jury Service Leave
71331.desc: Wages costs while employees are on Jury Service.
71331.pdf_desc: Wages costs while employees are on Jury Service.

71332.name: Study Leave
71332.desc: Wages costs while employees are on approved Study Leave.
71332.pdf_desc: Wages costs while employees are on approved Study Leave (DocsOpen #4007271 - Study Assistance for Employees).

72111.name: Minor Equipment & Supplies

72111.pdf_desc: Expenses less than $200 related to minor equipment & supplies that are not to be registered on the portable and attractive items register. (For portable and attractive items use 72311 to 72315).

72112.pdf_desc: Expenses related to purchase of chemicals, fertilisers and paints.

72260.name: Provision for Rehabilitation Expense
72260.desc: Rehabilitation provision for landfill & quarry sites. Financial Accounting only.
72260.pdf_desc: Expense relating to the increase in the rehabilitation provision arising from Council's obligation to rehabilitate it's Landfill & Quarry sites back to their original natural state (natural vegetation) once the site/s are no longer in use (i.e. completed & reached their capacity in case of waste landfill) & where Council doesn't account for the asset (landfill or quarry site) in the Financial Asset Register. For Financial Accounting use only.

72311.name: Other Plant & Equipment
72311.desc: Items below capitalisation threshold only. Not services or utilities.

72312.desc: Purchase of office/library equipment below threshold. NOT services or utilities.

72313.name: Furniture

73112.name: Audit Services — External Financial
73112.desc: External audit fees for FINANCIAL REPORTING ONLY.
73112.pdf_desc: Expenses related to external audit fees for financial reporting only to be charged to this natural account (other audit fees use 73116).

73113.name: Engineering Services
73113.desc: Engineering services NOT classified as consulting.
73113.pdf_desc: Expenses related to Engineering Services, which are not Consulting Services.

73115.pdf_desc: Expenses related to medical services such as Veterinarian, immunisation and other medical services.

73116.name: Investigations & Other Audit
73116.desc: Audit fees NOT for financial reports. Includes all non-financial audit.
73116.pdf_desc: Expenses related to audit fees that are not for the audit of financial reports.

73120.name: Waste Disposal (General)
73120.desc: General waste disposal costs not classified under more specific accounts. Check 73122 (garbage), 73129 (greenwaste), or 73130 (solid waste to landfill) first.
73120.source: v7 HTML only (PDF Data Dictionary silent)

73121.name: Cleaning & Sanitary
73121.pdf_desc: Expenses related to cleaning services and sanitary disposal.

73122.name: Garbage Collection
73122.desc: Waste disposal, payments to garbage contractor for domestic wheelie bin collection.
73122.pdf_desc: Expenses related to waste disposal, including payments to Council garbage contractor for domestic wheelie bin collection.

73123.name: Maintenance Services
73123.desc: Expenses related to maintenance services such as fire protection, pest control, repair fees, painters, building contractors, air conditioning, plumbers and other maintenance services. NOT security (73124), NOT landscaping/mowing (73126), NOT electrical (73127).
73123.pdf_desc: Expenses related to maintenance services such as fire protection, pest control, repair fees, painters, building contractors, air conditioning, plumbers and other maintenance services.

73124.name: Security
73124.desc: Expenses related to alarm monitoring, security patrols and other security services including keys and lock fitting. NOT general maintenance (73123).
73124.pdf_desc: Expenses related to alarm monitoring, security patrols and other security services including keys and lock fitting.

73125.name: Workplace Health & Safety
73125.pdf_desc: Expenses related to purchases of services to ensure compliance with workplace health & safety requirements.

73126.name: Landscapers & Gardeners
73126.desc: Expenses related to weed control, lawn mowing, landscaping and other gardening services purchased including the hire of indoor plants. NOT greenwaste disposal (73129).
73126.pdf_desc: Expenses related to weed control, lawn mowing, landscaping and other gardening services purchased including the hire of indoor plants.

73127.name: Electrical Maintenance
73127.pdf_desc: Expenses related to electrician services purchased.

73128.name: Other Services
73128.desc: Expenses related to other general services that do not fall under any other specific category, e.g. the Employee Assistance Program (EAP). This is a LAST RESORT account — before using it, check every other 731xx account for a better fit.
rules: Last resort — use only when no specific account applies
73128.pdf_desc: Expenses related to other general services that do not fall under any other specific category, e.g. the Employee Assistance Program (EAP).

73129.name: Greenwaste Processing & Disposal
73129.desc: Treatment and disposal of green waste through Council waste facilities.
73129.pdf_desc: Expenses relating to the treatment and disposal of green waste through Council's waste facilities.

73130.name: Waste Disposal
73130.desc: Costs for disposing of solid waste to landfill or other means (e.g. alternative waste treatment systems). NOT garbage bin collection (73122) or greenwaste (73129).
73130.pdf_desc: Costs for disposing of solid waste to landfill or other means (e.g. alternative waste treatment systems).

73131.name: Insurance Premium
73131.desc: Insurance premiums as advised by Admin Services & Risk Management Branch. Premiums ONLY — excess and damage payments NOT covered by insurance go to 73132–73137. Insurance recoveries received = 64211 (revenue).
73131.pdf_desc: Expenses related to insurance premiums, as advised by Admin Services & Risk Management Branch.

73132.name: Excess & Damage — Combined Liability
73132.desc: Amounts NOT covered by insurance — combined liability claims.
73132.pdf_desc: Expenses related to excess and damage payments for combined liability claims, not covered by insurance.

73133.name: Excess & Damage — Motor Vehicle
73133.desc: Amounts NOT covered by insurance — motor vehicle claims.
73133.pdf_desc: Expenses related to excess and damage payments for motor vehicle claims, not covered by insurance.

73134.name: Excess & Damage — Industrial
73134.desc: Amounts NOT covered by insurance — industrial claims.
73134.pdf_desc: Expenses related to excess and damage payments for industrial claims, not covered by insurance.

73135.name: Excess & Damage — Contract Work
73135.desc: Amounts NOT covered by insurance — contract works claims.
73135.pdf_desc: Expenses related to excess and damage payments for contract works claims, not covered by insurance.

73136.name: Excess & Damage — Employment
73136.desc: Amounts NOT covered by insurance — employment claims.
73136.pdf_desc: Expenses related to excess and damage payments for employment claims, not covered by insurance.

73137.name: Excess & Damage — Other
73137.desc: Amounts NOT covered by insurance — other claims.
73137.pdf_desc: Expenses related to excess and damage payments for other claims that do not fall under any other specific category, not covered by insurance.

73140.name: Pre-Employment Background Checks
73140.desc: Expenses relating to background checks for future employees, such as criminal history checks and reference verification.
73140.pdf_desc: Expenses relating to background checks for future employees.

73141.name: Drug & Alcohol Testing
73141.desc: Expenses relating to employee drug and alcohol testing programs to ensure workplace safety compliance.
73141.pdf_desc: Expenses relating to employee drug and alcohol testing.

73211.name: Minor Contracts (below $20k)
73211.desc: Contract payments where the TOTAL VALUE of the contract is BELOW $20,000. The threshold is the total contract value, NOT the individual invoice amount. A $3,000 invoice on a $50,000 contract must be 73212.
rules: Threshold = TOTAL contract, not per invoice
73211.pdf_desc: ) Contract payments relating to a contract where the total value of the contract is below $20,000.

73212.name: Major Contracts ($20k+)
73212.desc: Contract payments where the TOTAL VALUE of the contract is $20,000 or ABOVE. If total contract value is unknown, confirm before coding — default to 73212 if there is any doubt the total exceeds $20k.
73212.pdf_desc: Contract payments relating to a contract where the total value of the contract is $20,000 or above.

73213.name: Contractor Entitlements
73213.desc: Portable Long Service Leave levy payments for contractors.

73214.name: Agency Personnel Costs
73214.desc: Payments made to Employment Agencies (e.g. Hays, Chandler Macleod, Adecco) for temporary or permanent staff. Agency temps must NEVER be coded to 71113 Temporary Staff — 71113 is for people directly engaged and paid via Council payroll only.
73214.pdf_desc: Payments made to Employment Agencies for temporary or permanent staff.

73215.desc: Payments to Logan Water and Infrastructure Alliances.
73215.pdf_desc: Payments made to Logan Water and Logan Water Infrastructure Alliances.

73220.pdf_desc: Payments made to Traffic Control service providers.

73312.name: Electricity
73312.desc: Payments for electricity supply to Council facilities from external providers (e.g. Energex, Origin, AGL). Internal LCC electricity charges use 7B111 series.

73313.name: Telecommunication Services
73313.desc: Monthly rental and usage charges for phones (including mobile phones), facsimiles and data lines. NOTE: Purchases of phones should NOT be charged to this account — use 72314 Communication Equipment or 73564 IT Equipment.
73313.pdf_desc: Monthly rental and usage charges for phones (including mobile phones), facsimiles and data lines - purchases of phones should not be charged to this account.

73314.name: Water Base Charges
73314.desc: Water service/access charges from entities OTHER THAN LCC.
73314.pdf_desc: Expenses related to water service/access charges that are charged by entities (private or government) other than Logan City Council.

73315.name: Sewerage Base Charges
73315.desc: Sewerage charges from entities OTHER THAN LCC.
73315.pdf_desc: Expenses related to sewerage service/access charges that are charged by entities (private or government) other than Logan City Council.

73316.pdf_desc: Expenses related to water consumption use charged by entities (private or government) other than Logan City Council.

73412.desc: Refunds of contributions received by Council no longer required.
73412.pdf_desc: Refunds of contributions received by Council that are no longer required.

73423.pdf_desc: Expenses relating to the State Government's Waste Levy.

73425.pdf_desc: Expense adjustments relating to the holding of Carbon Emission permits issued under the Federal Government's Carbon Tax.

73431.name: Fines & Penalties

73431.pdf_desc: Expenses related to fines and penalties, including tax penalties.

73432.name: Commissions

73432.pdf_desc: Debt collection and other commission fees payable.

73433.name: Other Fees & Charges
73433.desc: Expenses related to fees and charges that do not fall under any other specific category, including meeting fees, licence fees, blue cards, and DigSafe. Does NOT include professional body memberships (use 73542).
73433.pdf_desc: Expenses related to fees and charges that do not fall under any other specific category, this includes meeting fees, licence fees, and blue cards.

73434.name: Regulatory Fees
73434.pdf_desc: Expenses related to industry regulators and ombudsman.

73438.name: Minor Damage Claims
73438.desc: Rectification costs for damage by Council activity to non-Council property. Excludes insurance.
73438.pdf_desc: Expenses related to rectification costs for damage caused by Council activity to non-Council property or re-imbursement of such costs to claimant (excludes insurance related matters).

73511.name: Entertainment & Hospitality FBT
73511.desc: Work related hospitality expenditure that INCURS FBT — off-site lunches and dinners, staff Christmas party expenses, events with alcohol, social/recreational functions. On-site nibbles at working meetings do NOT incur FBT — use 73512. Refer Hospitality & Entertainment Guide.
73511.pdf_desc: Work related hospitality expenditure that incurs Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT), such as off-site lunches and dinners and staff Christmas party expenses. Snack-type nibbles provided at working meetings held on- site do not incur FBT and should be charged to Entertainment & Hospitality Non-FBT (73512). Refer Hospitality & Entertainment Guide for more information.

73512.name: Entertainment & Hospitality Non-FBT
73512.desc: Snack-type nibbles and/or sandwiches or morning/afternoon tea provided at working meetings held ON-SITE only. No alcohol, no social element. These do NOT incur FBT. Off-site, alcohol, or social functions = 73511. Refer Hospitality & Entertainment Guide.
73512.pdf_desc: Snack-type nibbles and/or sandwiches or morning/afternoon tea provided at working meetings held on-site. These transactions do not incur Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT). Refer Hospitality & Entertainment Guide for more information.

73513.name: Employee Reward & Recognition
73513.desc: Flowers/cards/gifts for employees. Under $300 infrequent = no FBT.
73513.pdf_desc: Flowers/Cards/Gifts for employees. Where the purchase is infrequent and under $300 in value it will not incur FBT. Refer Hospitality & Entertainment Guide for more information.

73514.name: Employee Functions & Awards
73514.desc: Years of service rewards and associated functions.
73514.pdf_desc: Expenses related to provision of employee years of service rewards and associated functions.

73515.name: Presenter & Entertainer Fees
73515.desc: Speaker and presenter costs for community and workplace events. Non-FBT.
73515.pdf_desc: Expenses related to speaker and presenter costs for community and work place events.

73521.name: Property Leases & Rentals
73521.desc: Expenses related to EXTERNAL property leases and rentals only (e.g. commercial venues, hotel conference rooms). Internal LCC venue hire must use 7B611.
73521.pdf_desc: Expenses related to property leases and rentals.

73522.name: Equipment Leases & Rentals
73522.desc: Lease/rental of photocopiers, fax, other equipment.
73522.pdf_desc: Expenses related to lease or rental payments for photocopier, fax, and other equipment that is leased or rented.

73531.name: Local Travel (SEQ) Cabcharge/Parking
73531.desc: Expenses related to local taxi fares and parking fees in South East Queensland ONLY. NOT toll charges (use 73535). NOT interstate taxi/parking (use 73533). NOT overseas taxi/parking (use 73534).
73531.pdf_desc: Expenses related to local taxi fares and parking fees - not toll charges (should be 73535) and not expenses relating to interstate (should be 73533) or overseas (should be 73534) taxi fares or parking.

73532.name: Intrastate Travel & Accommodation
73532.desc: All travel and accommodation within Queensland.
73532.pdf_desc: Expenses related to all travel and accommodation within Queensland.

73533.name: Interstate Travel & Accommodation
73533.desc: Travel and accommodation within Australia, excluding SEQ and intrastate QLD.
73533.pdf_desc: Expenses related to all travel and accommodation within Australia, excluding local travel in South East Queensland (73531) and Travel & Accommodation in Queensland (73532).

73534.name: Overseas Travel & Accommodation
73534.desc: All expenses related to Overseas Travel and Accommodation. GST code NA. LGR 2012 s196 reporting requirements apply — must report attendees, positions, destination, purpose, cost.
73534.pdf_desc: All Expenses related to Overseas Travel and Accommodation.

73535.name: Tollway Charges
73535.desc: Toll charges (Motorway Qld invoices). NOT taxi/parking.
73535.pdf_desc: Toll Charges incurred by Council (Motorway Qld Invoices).

73541.name: Conferences & Seminar Fees
73541.desc: Conference registration fees ONLY. Accommodation/travel separate.
73541.pdf_desc: Expenses related to conference registration fees only. Accommodation and travel are separate natural accounts (73531 to

73542.name: Professional Membership
73542.desc: Expenses related to professional memberships paid to an external industry or professional organisation (e.g. AILA, CPA, Engineers Australia, IPWEA). Does NOT include licence fees, blue cards, or DigSafe — use 73433 Other Fees & Charges for those.
73542.pdf_desc: s Expenses related to professional memberships paid to an external industry and professional organisation for benefits such as discounted conference or seminars fees, access to free training sessions and information and/or inclusion on a professional body register. This does NOT include licence fees or blue cards or DigSafe (please use 73433 - Other Fees & Charges).
